one_time_description: Chief and Headmen Salary Claim Settlement received in 2023
economic_notes: Willow Cree Developments Limited Partnership constructing new gas bar and convenience store budgeted at $3,200,000, expected completion August 2023. Financing approved to maximum of $3,200,000 at prime plus 1.50% over 15 years. Cree Nation has guaranteed $3,200,000 of this debt.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to serious breaches of internal controls and accounting record deficiencies at Willow Cree Health Services Corporation; auditors unable to determine if adjustments to deferred revenue and surplus are necessary. One-time Chief and Headmen Salary Claim Settlement of $4,101,048 received. First Nations Drinking Water Settlement of $500,000 also received. New accounting policies adopted in 2023 for asset retirement obligations (PS 3280) and financial instruments (PS 3450) applied prospectively. Willow Cree Developments LP (GBE) is constructing a gas bar; Cree Nation has guaranteed $3,200,000 of debt. Consolidated entities include Willow Cree Health Services Corporation, CMHC Housing Program, Beardy's & Okemasis Legacy Trust, and Willow Budz. Long-term debt total of $4,775,828 includes current portion $744,000 plus long-term $4,031,828. Prior year surplus includes $2,912,752 loan insurance proceeds as other income.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
